testcase.name: test_adjust_franchise_should_be_allowed
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter85_franchise.py:146: in test_adjust_franchise_should_be_allowed assert r.status_code != 403, ( E AssertionError: BUG: adjust returns 403 for franchise_owner but review request requires access. tiffin_stock.py line 135 still has 'if user.role != admin'. Body: {"detail":"Admin only"} E assert 403 != 403 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_threshold_franchise_should_be_allowed
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter85_franchise.py:155: in test_threshold_franchise_should_be_allowed assert r.status_code != 403, ( E AssertionError: BUG: threshold returns 403 for franchise_owner but review request requires access. tiffin_stock.py line 169 still has 'if user.role != admin'. Body: {"detail":"Admin only"} E assert 403 != 403 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code
